character.name: Octopath Traveler HD-2D style chibi
character.prompt:
Octopath Traveler HD-2D style chibi female battle mage,
3-head-tall super-deformed proportions with cinematic depth,
large head with big detailed eyes, soft painterly shading, deep contrast lighting,
long silver hair flowing past shoulders, hair bangs across forehead, head bare,
wearing layered white and deep blue robe with elaborate gold filigree trim,
silver pauldrons with engraved patterns on shoulders,
midnight blue cloak with star-pattern lining draped behind to knees,
hood fabric hanging detached at upper back, never on head,
ornate wooden staff with glowing sapphire crystal orb in right hand,
brown leather belt with hanging scroll pouches,
young woman early 20s, mysterious confident pose,
rich pixel art with subtle gradients, moody atmospheric colors, sharp silhouette
